case_title: AMIN, M. vs. MOORE, STANLEY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, STANLEY MILLER, NANCY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

C/C CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. DEPT. 503B JUDGE PRO TEM KARL OLSON, M. ECHEVERRIA, CLRK. BELDON YEE, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: ARNOLD W. EVJE II, ATTY, FOR PLTF. NANCY MILLER DEFT, PRO PER. NOT PRESENT: STANLEY MOORE DEFT, PRO PER. STRIKE JURY TRIAL SEND TO COURT TRIAL. CASE NOT SETTLED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, STANLEY MILLER, NANCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH ST, #448 $780.00 RENT, $96.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $876.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS PER DIEM HOLD OVER OF $20.00.

DEPT 611: JUDGE DIANE WICK; BETH WILBER-CLERK; BRENDA FIELDS -REPORTER: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL; MR. EVJE APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF; NO APPEARANCE BY PRO PER DEFTS STANLEY MOORE OR NANCY MILLER; CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP WITHOUT DEFENDANTS; AFTER PLAINTIFF RESTS THE COURT RULES; PLTF SUBMITS A JUDGMENT; EVIDENCE IS WITHDRAWN AND RETURNED TO MR. EVJE.
